modal.danger_text: This action is immediate and should only be used when you really want to remove data.
modal.continue_question: Are you sure you want to continue?

delete.title: Delete Plex server
delete.message: Are you sure you want to delete the Plex server '{name}'? Its discovered library mappings will also be removed.

info.cache_help: Enabled libraries keep a cached Plex title index used by the automatic missing titles scan. The cache is refreshed by the scheduler, so people scans do not need to re-read the whole Plex library every time.

recent_candidates.help: Cached candidates ordered by popularity, then by death date.

language.label: Interface language *
language.help: Choose a fixed language, or use the browser language automatically.

tmdb_api_key.label: TMDb API key
tmdb_api_key.help: Used to improve filmography matching and missing titles detection.

detection_window_days.label: Detection window days *
detection_window_days.help: How many recent days are scanned when looking for newly deceased people.

display_days.label: Display days *
display_days.help: How long a tribute event and its Plex collections stay active.

max_people.label: Max simultaneous people *
max_people.help: Maximum number of tribute events created from recent candidates. Most popular candidates are selected first.

min_people_priority_display.label: Minimum people priority level *
min_people_priority_display.help: Hide low-priority web candidates from the dashboard and People page unless they are pinned, manually prioritized, or already active.

log_retention_days.label: Log retention days *
log_retention_days.help: Application logs older than this are deleted automatically.

job_retention_days.label: Job retention days *
job_retention_days.help: Detection and task history older than this are deleted automatically.

arr_activity_retention_days.label: Arr activity retention days *
arr_activity_retention_days.help: Arr push history older than this is deleted automatically.

missing_titles_refresh_hours.label: Missing titles refresh hours *
missing_titles_refresh_hours.help: How often the background scheduler refreshes each person missing movies and shows cache.

backup_interval_hours.label: Backup interval hours *
backup_interval_hours.help: How often automatic database backups may be created.

backup_retention_count.label: Backup retention count *
backup_retention_count.help: How many backup files are kept before older ones are pruned automatically.

default_media_mode.label: Default media mode *
default_media_mode.help: Default target content when an event is created automatically.

countries.label: Countries
countries.help: Comma-separated nationality filter. Leave empty to search all countries.

professions.label: Professions
professions.help: Comma-separated occupations filter, for example: actor,actress,director.

collection_summary_template.label: Collection summary template *
collection_summary_template.help: Used as the Plex collection description.

auto_detection_enabled.label: Enable web auto-detection
auto_detection_enabled.help: Allows the background scheduler to refresh candidates and create tribute events automatically. Manual dashboard actions still work even if this is disabled.

deduplicate_people.label: Deduplicate people
deduplicate_people.help: Avoids duplicate entries when the same person appears multiple times in source results.

auto_missing_titles_enabled.label: Enable automatic missing titles scan
auto_missing_titles_enabled.help: Refreshes each person missing movies and shows in background automatically, without opening the person page.

auto_arr_enabled.label: Enable automatic Arr push
auto_arr_enabled.help: Automatically sends missing movies and shows for active tribute events to linked Radarr / Sonarr targets.

auto_backup_enabled.label: Enable automatic database backup
auto_backup_enabled.help: Creates SQLite backups in the configured backup folder and keeps only the newest files according to the configured retention count.

publish_on_home.label: Publish on home (stored)
publish_on_home.help: Global preference stored by the app and combined with each library setting.

publish_on_friends_home.label: Publish on friends home (stored)
publish_on_friends_home.help: Global preference stored by the app and combined with each library setting.

backup.title: Database backups
backup.subtitle: Manual and automatic backups of the active SQLite database.
backup.checked_hourly: Checked hourly by the scheduler, created only when the configured interval is reached.
backup.interval_help: Maximum frequency for automatic backup creation.
backup.retention_help: Oldest backups are pruned automatically after new runs.
backup.restore_text: Restoring a backup replaces the active SQLite database with the selected backup. Before restoring, Memoria automatically creates a fresh safety backup of the current database.
backup.restore_confirm: Restore this backup and replace the active database? A safety backup of the current database will be created first.

filters.title: Filters
filters.subtitle: Search text, narrow quickly by level and date, then open advanced filters only when needed.

empty.title: No logs found
empty.message: No log matches the current filters. Try broadening the date range, clearing the source filter, or waiting for a new action to generate fresh entries.

stats.arr_ready_missing_desc: Missing titles that can be sent now

shortcuts.excluded_desc: People manually excluded from automatic selection
shortcuts.ignored_desc: People currently ignored until a future date

advanced.title: Dashboard details
advanced.subtitle: Secondary widgets can be hidden to keep the dashboard focused on daily actions.

settings_snapshot.title: Current settings snapshot
settings_snapshot.subtitle: Quick view of the rules currently driving automatic selection.

top_countries.title: Top countries
top_countries.subtitle: Based on currently active events.
top_countries.empty: No country data available on active events yet.

status_overview.title: Event status overview
status_overview.subtitle: Quick counters for all tribute events.

publishing.title: Collection publishing overview
publishing.subtitle: Current publication health for live active events.

problematic.title: Problematic events
problematic.subtitle: Active events needing attention.
problematic.empty: No obvious anomaly on active events.
